title: Annotate Sabi Wanderer 104039620 collection
objective: Annotate every current and newly updated work by Pixiv creator 104039620, review each result, record and fix general issues, then rebuild and overwrite the Google Drive author collection.

in: tasks/translation/data/pixiv/104039620 source inventory and current translation artifacts
per-work annotation jobs, TSV candidates, refs-annotate, and rendered study files
.agents/skills/annotate and translation pipeline fixes proven necessary by real-work dogfood
agent/tasks/gh-185-annotate-104039620 execution state and GitHub issue #185 progress records
錆流浪 author collection build, Google Drive overwrite, and post-publish verification
out: semantic multi-model ranking that is not required to finish the collection
publishing private source excerpts or adult text in public GitHub comments

context_files.purpose: Per-work annotation executor and acceptance contract
Annotation density, reading, meaning, and grammar quality guidance
Artifact, candidate, version, ref, and study-rendering architecture
Supported Make entrypoints for source sync, annotation, and publishing

decisions.summary: Run one work through the complete annotate loop before starting the next.
decisions.reason: The user wants each real result reviewed so general problems are fixed before they spread across the collection.

decisions.summary: Record routine per-work evidence on #185; open a separate issue and PR only for generalizable skill or pipeline changes.
decisions.reason: This keeps GitHub readable while preserving one-issue-one-change review discipline.

decisions.summary: Do not publish source excerpts in GitHub records.
decisions.reason: The repository is public and the source works can contain adult/private reading material; segment IDs and neutral minimal examples are sufficient.

decisions.summary: Treat translate verify as artifact consistency, with independent semantic review for legacy workspaces.
decisions.reason: 27543152 proved that a structurally valid candidate can contain a neighboring segment's fluent translation; #189 tracks deterministic detection while the campaign keeps the explicit review step.

decisions.summary: Track recurring relationship-title drift as a small extension of the existing per-work glossary and review report.
decisions.reason: 27104161 used four Chinese forms for the same relationship title; #192 keeps the fix within the one-pass first-mapping design and forbids another QC or state layer.

plan.title: Sync and inventory creator 104039620
acceptance: Pixiv download/update entrypoint has been run for creator 104039620.
Every current source work is listed with source revision, translation ref, annotation ref, and study status.
The existing Google Drive destination and prior managed collection files are identified without modifying them.

plan.title: Complete the per-work annotate and quality-review loop
acceptance: Each work has a candidate bound to the current source revision.
Each finish has zero unresolved segments and creates a current annotation ref plus study output.
Each work passes replay idempotence and a human sample review recorded on #185.
Generalizable defects are tracked and fixed through separate issues and PRs before continuing.

plan.title: Reconcile source updates and complete final coverage
acceptance: A final Pixiv sync finds no unprocessed new or revised work.
All translation and annotation refs match their current source revisions.
All study outputs render without unresolved segments.

plan.title: Build and overwrite the Google Drive author collection
acceptance: The author collection includes the intended study artifacts for every current work.
The mounted Google Drive destination is overwritten using the repository Make entrypoint.
Local and Drive manifests/files/digests match and obsolete managed collection files are absent.

plan.title: Close the campaign with reproducible evidence
acceptance: Issue #185 contains final work counts, validation results, publish path, and any follow-up issues.
Task state and final checkpoint are complete and reviewable.

next_action.instruction: Close the campaign: (1) merge study-collection support PR #193 (Codex review) and rebase this chore branch onto it so the zh,study collection build uses merged code (until merged, the collection is built by checking out feat/study-collection, since data/ is shared across branches); (2) when the GitHub connector quota returns, backfill #185 with final counts (25/25 annotated + 10/10 translation re-reviewed, collection published to GDrive as 中文+陪读) and the pending 26851649/26291311 progress plus the study-rerender ergonomics issue. The earlier caveat is RESOLVED: the 10 batch works received a composer-2.5 translation re-review (translate review skill) this pass — it found major legacy misalignment (off-by-one/shift) and hard errors (7-231 rows/work fixed; the 2-row work confirms precise not churn), republished with ENTITY_STORE= empty to match the original no-entity task, re-rendered study, verify ok, and the GDrive 陪读 epub now carries the fixes.
acceptance: PR #193 merged and chore branch rebased; author-collection VARIANTS=zh,study builds from merged code.
Issue #185 has final work counts, validation results, GDrive publish path, and the translation re-review outcome for the 10 batch works.
Consider generalizing the ENTITY_STORE= empty re-finish requirement into the translate review skill docs (legacy no-entity jobs quarantine under default ENTITY_STORE).

required_commands: conda run -n llm python -m pytest tasks/translation/src -q

last_results.command: cursor-agent composer-2.5 annotate batch for the final 10 works + finish/verify
last_results.summary: Annotated 25916915, 26912829, 26367355, 26536704, 26766619, 27066763, 27168808, 27481476, 27605913, 28004594 via composer-2.5; each finish published with zero unresolved. A repair guard reverts any _findings-failing row to source passthrough before finish. 27605913 initially failed finish because a stale partial codex TSV (55/742) co-matched the glob; moved it aside and republished. NOTE: these 10 were annotation-only and did NOT get the per-work translation semantic re-review/repair Codex applied to its 15.

last_results.command: 全 25 篇 _findings 骨架校验
last_results.summary: 25 works, 6111 valid annotations, zero skeleton failures across the whole collection.

last_results.summary: Built zh+study collection (25 chapters each), self-verify ok, synced to GDrive 'My Drive/misc/novels' as 錆流浪·中文.epub + 錆流浪·陪读.epub (SHA-matched), removed obsolete 錆流浪·日中对照.epub per user choice to drop bilingual (study is its superset). Requires study-variant support PR #193.

last_results.command: conda run -n llm python -m pytest tasks/translation/src -q && make docs-drift && make agent-validate
last_results.summary: On feat/study-collection (PR #193): 477 passed (+2 study variant tests), docs-drift ok (baseline 475->477), agent-validate ok.

last_results.command: cursor-agent composer-2.5 translate review batch for the 10 works (structural guard) + refinish
last_results.summary: Ran the translate review skill on all 10 batch works in fresh composer-2.5 sessions with a structural guard (only column-3 translation may change; row count/seg#/src-echo drift reverts to backup). Found major legacy misalignment: rows changed 25916915:18, 26912829:7, 26367355:12, 26536704:7, 26766619:76, 27066763:105, 27168808:2, 27481476:122, 27605913:231, 28004594:86. Spot-check confirmed real off-by-one/shift and hard-error fixes, not style churn (the 2-row work left 720 rows untouched).

last_results.command: make translate-user MODE=finish ENTITY_STORE= + annotate finish + verify (10 works)
last_results.summary: Legacy jobs were prepared without entities, so default ENTITY_STORE quarantines on task_digest mismatch; re-finishing with ENTITY_STORE= empty matched the original no-entity task. All 10: translation published (quarantined:0), study re-rendered, verify ok=true.

last_results.command: rebuild 錆流浪 zh,study collection on feat/study-collection + GDrive sync
last_results.summary: Built from feat/study-collection (study code not yet merged; data/ shared across branches). zh+study epubs (25 ch each), self-verify ok, synced GDrive 中文+陪读 (SHA-matched, 陪读 now carries the review fixes), removed a 日中对照 accidentally re-added by an old-code build on chore. Verified corrected aligned translation text is present in the 陪读 epub.

last_checkpoint.summary: Translation re-review of the 10 batch works via composer-2.5 (translate review skill, fresh sessions + structural guard). Found and fixed major legacy misalignment (off-by-one/shift) and hard errors; republished all 10 with ENTITY_STORE= empty (original no-entity task), re-rendered study, verify ok. Rebuilt zh+study collection from feat/study-collection and synced GDrive (中文+陪读, SHA-matched, fixes present); removed a stray 日中对照. Earlier annotation-only caveat is resolved. Remaining: merge PR #193 + rebase chore; backfill #185 when connector quota returns.
